TextView.android:text:
Motivation

1. Start Small
Great things are done by a series of small acts.

2. Consistency is Key
Success is the sum of small efforts repeated daily.

3. Fuel Your Body
Eat like you love yourself, not like you hate yourself.

4. Mindset Matters
Your body can stand almost anything. It’s your mind you have to convince.

5. Progress, Not Perfection
Don't compare your Chapter 1 to someone else's Chapter 20.

6. Stay Hydrated
Water is the driving force of all nature.

7. Keep Moving
A one-hour workout is only 4% of your day. No excuses.

8. Rest and Recover
Rest is not laziness; it’s a vital part of the process.

9. Believe in Yourself
You are stronger than you think and more capable than you know.

10. Finish Strong
Don't stop when you're tired. Stop when you're done.
